Hi [First Name],

I wanted to reconnect regarding GreenLeaf Technologies’ recent appointment of your new VP of Sales last quarter. Given this leadership change alongside your ongoing efforts to expand enterprise sales within US regional markets, I thought it made sense to check in and see if there is any additional context or priorities you’d like to share.

I realize the information so far is incomplete, so I’m happy to keep this low-key. If it’s helpful, here is a link to my calendar to find a convenient time for a brief chat.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
